calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Continued To Nov-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer.

The motion for leave to file an amended answer is denied. The City's motion does not include a declaration that satisfies the requirements of Rule of Court 3.1324, subdivisions (b)(3) and (b)(4): the LaFleur Declaration does not state when facts giving rise to the amended allegations were discovered and the reasons why the request for amendment was not made earlier. The court's concern about the missing information is not merely academic. The substantive inquiry on a motion to amend a pleading largely concerns whether there is inexcusable delay or prejudice. This motion presents a close question on prejudice; there is limited time left before the close of fact discovery and the City's proposed amendment plainly presents fact and discovery issues about how the City's inspection system was substantially affected by the COVID-19 pandemic, as the City represents in its moving papers. The City's failure to disclose information about its discovery of facts underlying the need for amendment deprives Plaintiff of the ability to mount a full argument about inexcusable delay.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Set For Trial On May-04-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
